title: Peer Counseling * Sexual Assault Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Peer Counseling * Sexual Assault Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Breast Cancer Breastfeeding Individuals Perinatal Depression Reproductive Issues Sexual Assault Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEXUAL ASSAULT SUPPORT SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY SEXUAL ASSAULT SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for survivors of past and present sexual assault, abuse, and harassment and for friends and family of survivors. Services include a crisis line, medical response and legal advocacy, support groups, peer support, community education and outreach for prevention, and information and referral. All services are confidential. 1902 Jefferson Street Suite 1 Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Survivors of sexual assault, abuse, and harassment, and their friends and family members Hours: -Crisis line, advocacy, legal, and medical response: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week -All other services: Hours vary (844) 404-7700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEXUAL ASSAULT SUPPORT SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY SEXUAL ASSAULT SUPPORT SERVICES
